value.0: Wraiths are incorporeal creatures born of evil and darkness. They despise all living things, as well as the light that nurtures them.
Spectres are incorporeal undead often mistaken for Ghosts. They haunt the places where they died, retaining their sentience but now hating all living things.

Rules Of The Homer LOTR's Staff

1) Follow ALL the rules of the server and the rules that follow. 

2) Do not remove gear for players or hook up player just for shits and giggles.

3) Do not use Homer's House as a place to port PCs and interact with them. Please use Mount Homer <DMHQ> from here on out. *I know that is a cheese ball name and if someone would come up with something better, don't be shy*

4) Sometimes dealing with the unruly player is a task a DM partake in. Please, be rash with the disciplinary measure handed out. *does the punishment fit the crime.*

5) When playing as PC only use droped gear or tournament items. *I hated make'n this rule.... however we need to be fair. *

6) We all enjoy new players here on Homer's Lord of the Rings. And it's a good time to be able take care of our friends when they come to Homer's to play. This is okay. HOWEVER NO PLAYER SHOULD HAVE GEAR THAT IS NOT DROPED ON THIS SERVER. NO CUSTOM GEAR. 

7) All DMs are equal. The most senior Dungeon Masters are Myself, Popoe, and Cassy. If a problem occurs between Dungeon Masters one of these three will have the final word in the problematic situation occuring, and that will be the last we will hear of that matter.

8) NO RACIST OR ABUSIVE REMARKS DIRECTED TOWARD ANYONE

9) If you spawn a monster or an NPC for the players to fight, the DM must hang out and wait for that creature to respawn and then force it into Limbo.

We also need more tournaments and quest. Please try to do them when you feel the need. 
         Homer
